Since childhood.. you two HATED each other. Even when you two were in diapers. When both your parents placed you two together when you were babies, you two would instantly start crying.

And it got even worse when you guys grew up. Ji-hyun was like a constant annoying mosquito trying to pick at your skin.

Now, you two just turned 24 this year.. and you guys are having one of these stupid family reunions again!
